Background:
thumb|left|A young Toneri with his clan.
Toneri was born into the Ōtsutsuki clan's Branch family, leading to his eyes being sealed within the Energy Vessel at birth; in place of vision, he learned to sense the world around him instead. Growing up with his father on the Moon, Toneri desired human friends, unlike the puppet servants that served his family. On multiple occasions, the two would take travel to Earth to secretly observe the Hyūga Clan in Konohagakure, whom descended from Hamura's direct bloodline. Toneri's father at some point suggested that Toneri should someday marry Hinata Hyūga; the latter whom was heiress of the Hyūga clan at the time. When his father was on his deathbed, he encouraged Toneri to forget about the clan's decree and go to Earth to find friends and comrades, to live for his own sake. After his passing, Toneri thought about his ancestor's wishes, leading to him deciding to stay on the moon isolated as the last surviving member of his clan's branch family, with only the clan's autonomous puppets for company.
Personality:
Toneri carries hatred towards mankind for weaponising chakra and once plotted to destroy humanity as punishment, a goal which he states that the branch family of his clan desired for a thousand years. He usually displays a calm and cool demeanour driven to completing the Thousand Year Plan to wipe out the shinobi world. He has also shown to be hypocritical as, in spite of his hating humanity for using chakra as a weapon, he used it to attack Naruto Uzumaki and the rest of the Hanabi Rescue Team.
From a young age, Toneri has loved Hinata and dreamed of someday taking her as his bride. When he initiated his plan to destroy the Earth, he made repeated efforts to convince her to join him, so that she would not die along with the rest of the Earth's population. After Hinata initially appears to accept his marriage proposal, Toneri does his best to accommodate her, giving her free reign of the castle and promising to share all the castle's secrets with her after they're married. He attempts to bond with her by dining together and requesting that she knit a scarf for him; he takes her agreement to this request as a good sign. At the same time, he remains concerned by her frequent thoughts about Naruto and refuses to listen to her requests that he spare the Earth. When he discovers that Hinata only agreed to marry him as a pretence and a ruse to stop his plans and that, moreover, the scarf she was knitting was meant for Naruto, Toneri became enraged, accusing her of betraying him. Toneri has been shown to be selfish on several occasions: for example, he did not consider how Hinata felt about them getting married and later placed her under his control when he realised she had no intention of marrying him. Despite being in love with her, Toneri did not stop Hinata from leaving once he realised she and Naruto love each other. 
His zealotry made him stubborn as he refused to pay heed to Hinata and Naruto's attempts to convince him to stop his destructive plan, and it took him being saved from a near-death experience for him to be persuaded. After learning that Hamura never wanted to destroy the world, Toneri expressed sincere regret in his actions. Wishing to atone for his sins, he decided that the Moon would never again approach Earth and, as a result, chose to live alone on the Moon in peace.
Abilities:
Toneri is a powerful individual, possessing chakra similar to Kaguya Ōtsutsuki. His prowess being such that he could combat the likes of Naruto Uzumaki while utilising his senjutsu-enhanced Nine-Tails Chakra Mode. Toneri has enough medical knowledge to transplant eyes and treat severe injuries. Similar to his ancestor Hamura, Toneri is able to communicate with others from afar, accomplishing this by entering their dreams.
[Ninjutsu] thumb|left|Toneri knocking Hinata out with an orb of chakra.
Toneri can create a green orb to use for various purposes, such as reading minds, absorbing chakra from a distance, and detonating the orb if needed. He is also able to project images of himself in order to deliver messages, and can manifest his green sphere through his projection. Because his eyes were taken from him as an infant, Toneri instead observes his surroundings by sense, a faster and more detailed way of taking in the world. This perception is great enough that he can watch events on Earth from the Moon. He also has some space–time ninjutsu prowess, as he is able to smooth away distortions.
Toneri has the Ōtsutsuki Clan's army of Autonomous Puppets at his disposal, which act according to his thoughts. While at home, these puppets serve him. In battle, these puppets can be used to quickly overwhelm his opponents. The puppets rely on the Energy Vessel for power, and thus lose all function after the Energy Vessel is destroyed. Toneri can also use the Puppet Technique directly, which he does by placing a sphere of chakra within a target's body. Like the autonomous puppets, he controls his targets with his thoughts.
[Byakugan] While born with the Byakugan, like the rest of his clan, his eyes were later sealed away within the Energy Vessel, leaving Toneri blind. Later, Toneri implanted Hanabi Hyūga's Byakugan into his own eye sockets. This allowed Toneri to gain a near 360° field of x-ray vision and the ability to see vast distances, as well as the chakra pathway system. After his Tenseigan reverted back to his Byakugan, Hinata Hyūga took back Hanabi's eyes, leaving him blind again.
[Tenseigan] thumb|Toneri's Tenseigan.
Upon implanting Hanabi's Byakugan into his eye sockets, Toneri's eyes matured into the Tenseigan. With these eyes, he can control attractive and repulsive forces that are capable of lifting the rocks of the Moon to use them as projectiles and pull the Moon itself towards Earth without the use of the Tenseigan Energy Vessel.
